threshold_policy.mcc: selected exclusively from inner OOF predictions
threshold_policy.f1: selected exclusively from inner OOF predictions
threshold_policy.balanced_accuracy: selected exclusively from inner OOF predictions
threshold_policy.youden_j: selected exclusively from inner OOF predictions

lopo_hyperparameter_policy: For each held-out paper, freeze the modal selected hyperparameters from repeated grouped outer folds whose training partitions excluded that paper; resolve modal ties lexically. LOPO thresholds remain fitted from grouped inner OOF predictions using only the LOPO training partition.

bootstrap.note: Repeated outer predictions are averaged per row before bootstrap; grouped protocols resample complete canonical-paper clusters.
